# coolify_hetzner_images (Data Source)

Lists all available Hetzner cloud images.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_hetzner_images" "all" {}

output "hetzner_image_names" {
  value = [for img in data.coolify_hetzner_images.all.images : img.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `images` (Attributes List) The list of Hetzner images. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--images))

<a id="nestedatt--images"></a>
### Nested Schema for `images`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the image.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the image.
- `name` (String) The name of the image.
